raw.message:
Signe chez les pros ✍️
Télécharge dès maintenant ton App Betclic ! 🫡

hook.summary: A young man addresses the viewer with urgency about joining a team.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a UGC speaker talking directly to the camera with red and white graphic borders.
hook.voiceover_transcript: C'est maintenant ou jamais pour changer de couleurs !

scene_flow: UGC speaker introduces the 'now or never' opportunity to join the brand's team.
Transition to a full-screen graphic detailing a 100€ cash-back welcome offer.
Dynamic montage of professional soccer players in action wearing branded jerseys.
Final branding screen with the slogan 'Signe chez les pros' and the offer repeated.
audience_proxy: French-speaking sports fans and bettors looking for a low-risk entry offer.
